verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This song I sing for you Has a melody as simple as you No doubt I offer to you And give the best I have

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm just a poor but I give my heart Just for you my one and only you I honestly have tomorrow And today to be with you I faithfully and humbly love you There's only one forever you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: This song my pledge to you Has a rhyme that reminds me of you I live with no regret I stand forever and true I'm just an ordinary girl Who's in love to one in a million you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: From the rising of the sun Till it's setting down Seven days on a week I will keep on loving you I honestly have tomorrow And today to be with you
